title: Propulsion Theory Quiz
description: Complete a written assessment covering fundamental propulsion theory, engine types, and the basics of fuel chemistry introduced in the first module.

title: Combustion Analysis Lab
description: Conduct a lab exercise analyzing combustion processes for different rocket fuels, measuring efficiency and identifying instability factors.

title: Nozzle Design Project
description: Design and optimize a rocket nozzle for a given set of performance requirements, documenting your design decisions and trade-offs.

title: Fluid Dynamics Problem Set
description: Solve a series of problems on fluid dynamics fundamentals including pressure, velocity fields, and the continuity equation as applied to aerodynamic flows.

title: Subsonic vs Supersonic Flow Analysis
description: Analyze and compare airflow behavior in subsonic and supersonic regimes, including shock wave formation and its impact on lift and drag.

title: Aerodynamic Heating Case Study
description: Evaluate thermal protection system requirements for a re-entry vehicle given aerodynamic heating data, and propose a viable material solution.

title: Spacecraft Structural Design Homework
description: Complete problems on spacecraft structural loads, materials selection, and design requirements for launch and on-orbit environments.

title: Orbital Mechanics Mission Plan
description: Plan an orbital mission by calculating transfer orbits, delta-v requirements, and mission timeline using orbital mechanics principles.

title: Spacecraft Systems Integration Project
description: Develop a systems engineering document for a small spacecraft, integrating subsystems including power, thermal control, propulsion, and payload.

title: Functional Groups Identification Lab
description: Identify and classify functional groups in a set of organic compounds using spectroscopic data and apply IUPAC naming conventions.

title: Reaction Mechanisms Worksheet
description: Draw and explain the step-by-step mechanisms for a series of organic reactions including substitution, elimination, and addition reactions.

title: Organic Synthesis Design Project
description: Design a multi-step synthesis pathway for a target organic molecule, justifying reagent and condition choices at each step.

title: Coordination Chemistry Problem Set
description: Solve problems on coordination compounds, including naming metal complexes, determining oxidation states, and applying crystal field theory.

title: Bonding and Symmetry Assignment
description: Analyze the bonding and symmetry of inorganic molecules using group theory and molecular orbital diagrams.

title: Inorganic Synthesis Lab Report
description: Synthesize an inorganic compound in the lab, characterize it using analytical techniques, and write a full lab report documenting your findings.

title: Thermodynamics Problem Set
description: Solve thermodynamics problems involving enthalpy, entropy, Gibbs free energy, and equilibrium constants for chemical reactions.

title: Quantum Mechanics and Spectroscopy Lab
description: Apply quantum mechanical models to interpret spectroscopic data, including IR, UV-Vis, and NMR spectra of selected molecules.

title: Reaction Kinetics Experiment
description: Design and carry out a kinetics experiment to determine the rate law and activation energy of a chemical reaction, and present your analysis.

title: Elvish Script Translation Exercise
description: Transcribe and translate a set of inscriptions written in Sindarin and Quenya, demonstrating understanding of grammatical structure and script conventions.

title: Comparative Linguistics Analysis
description: Write a comparative analysis of Khuzdul and the Black Speech, examining their linguistic structures, origins, and cultural significance within Middle-earth lore.

title: Philological Research Paper
description: Research and write a paper on the evolution of one Middle-earth language, tracing its historical development, key texts, and influence on the cultures that spoke it.

title: Council of Elrond Case Study
description: Analyze the Council of Elrond as a diplomatic event, evaluating the negotiation strategies, competing interests, and decision-making processes of each race represented.

title: Inter-species Alliance Report
description: Research a key alliance between two or more races in Middle-earth, examining the political motivations, terms of cooperation, and long-term outcomes of the partnership.

title: War of the Ring Diplomacy Simulation
description: Participate in a structured simulation of War of the Ring diplomacy, representing one of the major factions and negotiating outcomes with other groups based on historical lore.
